query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: An upward nighttime view of a curved traffic signal pole with a red illuminated light on the left side, a bright streetlight fixture overhead to the right, and bare tree branches near a distant second streetlight visible in the lower left corner against a dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An oppressive nighttime scene captured from a steep, unstable upward angle, showing a curved traffic signal pole with a red light beneath a massively blown-out streetlight that burns as an incandescent white orb. Heavy darkness and haze smear fine details into ambiguity, leaving bare tree branches and distant lights barely visible through a murky gloom that creates a suffocating, isolated atmosphere.
